title: Dil Kya Kare
subTitle: The parents of an adopted child face issues of love, betrayal and custody when their daughter's birth mother arrives.

title: Bahurani
subTitle: Amit wants to marry a modern woman but his parents get him married to a village girl, Madhuri. When Amit refuses to accept her as his wife, Madhuri reinvents herself as Malathi and re-enters his life.

title: Rafoo Chakkar: Fun on the Run
subTitle: Two brothers, Manjeet and Parmeet, run away from their home in order to avoid getting married. Eventually, they lead a life of crime and things take a turn when they get arrested.

title: Mera Muqadaar
subTitle: Shanti and Suraj lead a content life until he abandons her to marry Ruchi. Shanti and Ruchi both give birth to boys, who grow up and fight each other, unaware that they are half-brothers.

title: Lakshman Rehka
subTitle: Amar sets out to avenge his father's death but gets beaten to the brink of death. He returns to carry on his vendetta, only to be confronted by Vicky, a criminal-turned-policeman and his close friend.

title: Kunwara
subTitle: Raju and Urmila fall deeply in love and vow to reunite in India. However, complications arise when Raju agrees to pose as Sharmila's husband before her family.

title: Farishtay
subTitle: Veeru and Dheeru live under the tyrant ruler, Raja Jaichand. Later, they embark on a mission and strive to overcome challenges to defeat the dictator.

title: Chot - Aaj Isko, Kal Tereko
subTitle: Kishan, a dairy farmer, and Kabir, his brother, run into trouble when a local promoter decides to take over their land. When a corrupt inspector plays his part and kills Kabir, Kishan vows vengeance.

title: Mera Karam Mera Dharam
subTitle: Ajay, a businessman, provides funds to Sarjuprasad to develop his hometown. When he learns that the money has been misappropriated by Sarjuprasad, he resolves to set things right.

title: Beta
subTitle: After the death of his mother, Raju's father re-marries, but his stepmother is only after the family's money. When Raju eventually marries, his wife tries to make him realise what kind of woman his stepmother is.

title: Waqt Ki Awaz
subTitle: A rich girl runs away from home and settles down with a truck driver. However, her dream life is shattered when she learns that her new lover has been accused of murder.

title: Waqt Ki Awaz
subTitle: A rich girl runs away from home and settles down with a truck driver. However, her dream life is shattered when she learns that her new lover has been accused of murder.

title: Kaun Sachcha Kaun Jhootha
subTitle: Karan Saxena, a police officer, arrests Sapna Mathur, a woman accused of killing his fellow constable. Things take a turn when Karan falls in love with her and helps her escape her death sentence.

title: Dharam Veer
subTitle: Twin brothers separated at birth become best friends, unaware of their bond as siblings. The queen, their mother, becomes the uniting force as they set out to defeat their evil uncle.

title: Hotel Milan
subTitle: Vipul and Saurabh, two friends, decide to put an end to the misery of couples by starting a love hotel. However, the local political group is not in favour of their venture.

title: Antim Nyay
subTitle: Jay Singh encounters Seema while struggling to seek justice for his deceased father. As the couple attempts to live a happy life, unforeseen circumstances invite more troubles.

title: Judwaa
subTitle: Twin brothers Raja and Prem Malhotra get separated at birth but are reunited by fate to defeat Ratanlal, a local gangster, who wants to destroy the Malhotra family.

title: Nakshatra
subTitle: An aspiring screenwriter becomes involved in a diamond heist while writing a script for his film and struggles to evade the police.

title: Zed Plus
subTitle: Aslam, a villager who runs a small business, accidentally meets the prime minister of India, who grants him special security on his request. Soon, he starts chasing political ambitions.

title: Anwar
subTitle: Anwar, a Muslim boy, falls in love with a Hindu girl who rejects him and elopes with his best friend. Post her death, a misunderstanding leads the police to believe that he is a terrorist.

title: Ajay
subTitle: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.

title: Jigariyaa
subTitle: Shaamu, who lives a carefree life, falls in love with a well-educated girl, Raadha. However, circumstances force the young couple to part ways.

title: Jigariyaa
subTitle: Shaamu, who lives a carefree life, falls in love with a well-educated girl, Raadha. However, circumstances force the young couple to part ways.

title: Imaandaar
subTitle: Things turn awry when a businessman, unaware of the truth, allows his pampered daughter to get engaged to the son of his old rival.

title: Banjaran
subTitle: The universe offers a Banjara tribe leader's daughter an opportunity to turn her doomed love story into a happily-ever-after with her soulmate.

title: Bazaar
subTitle: Najma is in love with Akhtar but cannot marry him until he is financially stable. An elderly Shakir promises to help Akhtar set up his business in exchange for Najma finding a suitable bride for him.

title: Mandi
subTitle: Rukmini Bai runs a brothel that is visited by some of the most prominent men in the society. However, when one of the prostitutes has an illicit affair, the establishment is put at risk.

title: Dil Ka Rishta
subTitle: Jai, a wealthy businessman in love with Tia, accidentally kills her husband in a car crash. After the accident Tia loses her memory and falls for Jai, who struggles with guilt.

title: Bhumika: The Role
subTitle: Urvashi who becomes an actress with the help of Keshav, ends up marrying him. However, things complicate when she indulges in affairs with prominent men in the film industry.

title: Pakeezah
subTitle: Sahibjaan, a young courtesan, falls in love with Salim. The two wish to marry, but the nature of her profession keeps casting a dark shadow over their plans.

title: Satta
subTitle: Anuradha relocates to Mumbai where she meets Vivek, an aspiring politician, and marries him. Things take a turn when he is arrested for murder and she has to take his place in the upcoming elections.

title: Kya Kehna
subTitle: A young university student's world is rocked when her brief involvement with a wealthy playboy results in her pregnancy.

title: Amba
subTitle: When Amba gets her son Rajendra arrested for sexually assaulting their servant's daughter, Rajendra's wife wreaks havoc into their lives as she vows to avenge him.
